title: AN ACT AMENDING ITEM 81, FOR THE PROVINCE OF LAGUNA, PAGE 162, PARAGRAPHG,SECTION TWO OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED SIXTEEN HUNDRED THIRTEEN.

chunks.text:
H. No. 1938 / 55 OG No. 35, 7305 (August 31, 1959)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2444, June 21, 1959 ]

AN ACT AMENDING ITEM 81, FOR THE PROVINCE OF LAGUNA, PAGE 162, PARAGRAPH

G,

SECTION TWO OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED SIXTEEN HUNDRED THIRTEEN.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Item 81, for the Province of Laguna, page 162, paragraph g, section two of Republic Act Numbered Sixteen hundred thirteen is amended to read as follows:

"81. Santa Cruz Town Hall,

Sta. Cruz

10,000.00."

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without executive approval, June 21, 1959.
